name: Topgolf Swing Suite
address: 11121 Southern Blvd, Royal Palm Beach, FL 33411
about: Topgolf Swing Suite is a technology-driven golf entertainment venue that combines simulator play with a bar and food service. It offers indoor golf bays equipped with advanced tracking technology for practice, gameplay, and social events. The venue caters to golfers of all skill levels, providing both casual entertainment and serious practice opportunities in a relaxed atmosphere. Pricing is structured per bay hour, making it accessible for individuals and groups to enjoy extended gameplay sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced launch monitor technology provides accurate ball and club tracking
On-site food and drink service enhances the social experience
Flexible bay configurations accommodate both casual play and serious practice
Available for private events and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with a menu of appetizers, meals, and snacks
Full bar service with beer, wine, and cocktails available

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary simulator system with integrated targeting and scoring

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are provided at each bay, but you're welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted, but the venue offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically 18 holes takes 45-60 minutes per bay, depending on group size and skill level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Topgolf Swing Suite welcomes children and families with age-appropriate activities and food options.
